case_title: WILLA GRACE VS. TRIP MATE, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILLA GRACE. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GRACE, WILLA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $449.00 FILED BY GRACE, WILLA AS TO DEFENDANT TRIP MATE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
